summary: Completed initial testing of Enhanced Poetry App with Firebase Authentication. App loads successfully with good UI/UX, but authentication system is not working, preventing testing of core authenticated features.

critical_bugs.issue: Login fails with 'auth/invalid-credential' error for admin email arorariva19@gmail.com
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all authenticated features including admin dashboard, user profiles, comments, and request submission

critical_bugs.issue: Database appears to be empty - no poems found in any genre
critical_bugs.impact: No content to display or interact with

configuration_issues.issue: Admin account may not exist in Firebase Auth or credentials are incorrect
configuration_issues.symptoms: Cannot authenticate with provided admin email
configuration_issues.workaround: Need to create admin account in Firebase Console or verify credentials

navigation_bugs.issue: Request a Poem and View Requests links don't navigate to separate pages
navigation_bugs.current_behavior: Links are clickable but stay on homepage URL

integration_issues.issue: Login form submits but fails with Firebase error

passed_tests: Header and navigation UI elements are present
Login and signup forms are accessible and functional
Form validation works (signup form shows validation messages)
Genre filter tabs are working (All, Love, Sad, Motivational, Nature, Other)
UI/UX design is clean with proper dark theme and golden accents
No JavaScript errors or console errors (except authentication)
Responsive design elements are properly positioned
action_item_for_E1: CRITICAL: Fix Firebase Authentication - admin login failing with 'auth/invalid-credential'. Need to either create admin account in Firebase Console or verify credentials. Also fix navigation routing for Request/View Requests pages and populate database with sample poems for testing.
